approval_clusters.representative_headline: Therapists save 2 hours daily with AI.
approval_clusters.representative_body:
What would you do with 10 extra hours per week?

That's what JotPsych gives back to therapists who were drowning in documentation. No more staying late. No more notes on weekends. No more choosing between thorough documentation and your own mental health.

Our AI listens to your sessions and creates complete, HIPAA-compliant notes in the time it takes you to grab coffee. Built by people who understand behavioral health documentation isn't just checkboxes. it's clinical thinking.

See it in action.

Your last session ends at 5pm. Your notes are already done. JotPsych listens to your sessions and writes your clinical documentation while you're fully present with your clients. SOAP notes, treatment plans, CPT codes . finished before you pack your bag. 500+ behavioral health clinicians now leave work on time.

approval_clusters.representative_headline: "I haven't seen my kid's bedtime in three months."
approval_clusters.representative_body:
That's what one therapist told us before switching to JotPsych.

Now? She's home by 6:30. Every night.

The difference isn't working fewer hours or seeing fewer clients. It's not spending 2+ hours every day on documentation.

JotPsych generates your clinical notes automatically from your sessions. What used to take 20-30 minutes per client now takes 3 minutes total. HIPAA-compliant. Clinically thorough. Actually done.

You've already done the hard work in the session. Let us handle the typing.

Most solo therapists chart until 7 or 8pm. JotPsych users leave at 6. The difference? AI documentation that writes itself from your session recordings. SOAP notes, treatment plans, billing codes included. HIPAA-compliant for behavioral health. Try it free and finish work on time for once.

approval_clusters.representative_headline: Your session ends. Your notes don't have to.
approval_clusters.representative_body:
Client walks out at 4:30. By 4:33, your progress note is done.

Not a draft. Not bullet points you'll "flesh out later" (meaning tonight at home). Done. Comprehensive. Ready to sign.

That's JotPsych. AI that actually understands clinical documentation because it was built by people who've written thousands of these notes themselves.

HIPAA-compliant. Customizable to your style. Zero learning curve.

The 2 hours you spend on charting every day? They're yours again.

Why are 10,000 clinicians finishing notes in minutes while you're still charting at 7pm? JotPsych. AI that writes your clinical documentation from session recordings. CPT codes applied.
